scope.syntheticDataDisclaimer: Synthetic demo data only. Not PHI. Not medical or legal advice.
scope.separateProjectGuardrail: Do not reuse or modify AgentFactoryDemo for this proof.

officialActivationFlow: Greenfield coded agents must be scaffolded with uip codedagent new and initialized with uip codedagent init.
Low-code Agent Builder packets must validate before any run/debug.
Bindings are derived from SDK/resource calls and regenerated through the official sync workflow.
evidenceToCapture: run id or debug session id
LangSmith trace URL or trace metadata
event mirror ids written by UiPath-owned orchestration

registrationDiscovery: uip maestro case process list --output json
officialActivationFlow: Validate an approved caseplan.json before any debug/run.
Refresh solution resources before upload or debug.
Use the TreatmentAccessHackathon folder key for approved runs.
approvalGatedCommands: uip maestro case debug uipath/maestro --folder-id 7986316 --output json
uip maestro case process run <case-process-key> 4fba2fa1-012b-469a-b6aa-e5be3811c173 --inputs '<synthetic-json>' --validate --output json

officialActivationFlow: Create tasks only through an approved Maestro/HITL, Action App, or workflow path using the checked-in quickform contracts.
Discover task id and type before assign, reassign, complete, or inspect operations.
Complete or assign tasks only after a separate explicit approval.
approvalGatedCommands: approved Maestro/HITL or workflow step that creates exactly one synthetic task
evidenceToCapture: status before and after the approved action
event mirror id for the task gate

officialActivationFlow: Confirm the Data Fabric CLI exposes folder scoping before any record write.
Resolve the native folder-scoped entity id from discovery instead of assuming names.
Insert or update only synthetic records that match uipath/data-service/entities.json.
evidenceToCapture: post-write readback command output with secrets redacted

registrationDiscovery: uip or processes list --folder-path TreatmentAccessHackathon --output json
uip or folders runtimes TreatmentAccessHackathon --output json
uip or sessions attended list --folder-path TreatmentAccessHackathon --output json
officialActivationFlow: Resolve the published process key before starting a job.
Confirm a connected Development runtime is available for this hackathon folder.
Pass only local mock payer portal and synthetic case inputs.
approvalGatedCommands: uip or jobs start <process-key> --folder-path TreatmentAccessHackathon --runtime-type Development --jobs-count 1 --input-arguments '<synthetic-json>' --wait-for-completion --timeout 300 --output json

registrationDiscovery: uip rpa analyzer-rules list --scope Workflow --project-dir uipath/robots/PayerPortalFallback --output json
officialActivationFlow: Use the real PayerPortalFallback project created by uip rpa init.
Indicate UIA targets against the synthetic mock payer portal before live smoke.
Validate Main.xaml and build the project before run/debug.
approvalGatedCommands: uip rpa debug start uipath/robots/PayerPortalFallback --input-arguments '<synthetic-json>' --output json
evidenceToCapture: run or debug id if approved

officialActivationFlow: Refresh resources before pack, upload, or deploy.
Pack locally before publish/deploy.
Deploy only to TreatmentAccessHackathon through the approved parent folder key.

defaultMode.name: no_side_effect_readiness
forbiddenWithoutApproval: Action Center task creation, assignment, or completion
solution upload, publish, deploy, or activate
